data.description: Axios, citing the White House spokesperson, reports that the agreement will be announced once parties finalize details on Greenland.

data.title: ADTRAN Holdings, Inc. shares preliminary Q4 and FY 2025 results. Includes unaudited revenue figures and operating margins.
data.description: ADTRAN Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADTN and FSE: QH9) disclosed preliminary unaudited revenue, alongside GAAP and non-GAAP operating margin, for the quarter and year ending December 31, 2025, in Huntsville, Ala. The company's announcement was prompted by German ad hoc disclosure regulations in light of anticipated results exceeding previously projected revenue guidance. Key financial metrics were made public due to this anticipated outperformance.

data.title: Arrow Electronics (NYSE: ARW) named to Fortune's "World’s Most Admired Companies" list for 26th time, recognized in “Wholesalers: Electronics and Office Equipment” category for high performance. Based on input from thousands of executives, directors, and members of the financial community.
data.description: In Centennial, Colorado, Arrow Electronics, Inc. (NYSE: ARW) has secured its position on Fortune's prestigious World’s Most Admired Companies list for an impressive 26th time. The company excels in the "Wholesalers: Electronics and Office Equipment" category, standing out for its financial strength and the excellence of its products and services. This recognition is based on feedback from numerous executives, directors, and financial community members, highlighting Arrow’s consistent high performance and quality in its industry.

data.title: Ontario Airport reveals new monument sign at Archibald Ave & Airport Dr, symbolizing growth and momentum after a decade.
data.description: In Ontario, California, on January 21, 2026, the Ontario International Airport (ONT) revealed a new monument sign at the intersection of Archibald Avenue and Airport Drive. This sign symbolizes the airport's growth and ongoing progress as it commemorates ten years of operation. The sign serves as a bold representation of the airport's evolution and success in the aviation industry.

data.title: Ondo Finance introduces 200 tokenized stocks/ETFs to SOL network, capturing 65% of RWA assets. (Read More)
data.description: Ondo Global Markets has recently introduced its platform on Solana's blockchain with tokenized forms of popular assets like NVDA, AAPL, SPY, and over 200 other securities. This move has enabled them to secure 65% of the network's total RWA assets.

data.title: Nielsen affiliate, Neptune BidCo US Inc., prices upized $1.5 billion offering of 9.500% Senior Secured Notes due 2033.
data.description: Neptune BidCo US Inc., affiliated with Nielsen Holdings Limited, disclosed on January 21, 2026, the pricing of an offering for $1.5 billion aggregate principal amount of 9.500% Senior Secured Notes due in 2033. The issuer, also known as the Company, made this announcement regarding the successful pricing of the offering.

data.title: YouTube eyes AI growth in 2026, vows to crack down on ‘AI Slop’. Enhancing AI tools for creators, targeting low-quality AI videos.
data.description: The platform has announced plans to enhance AI creation tools for creators and increase efforts to crack down on low-quality AI-generated videos. This initiative aims to improve the overall quality of content on the platform and provide users with better tools to create engaging AI content.

data.title: Bullseye Event Group reveals 2026 Players Tailgate venue in Santa Clara for Super Bowl 60 near Levi's Stadium.
data.description: The Players Tailgate is set to become one of the sole pregame hospitality choices located near Levi's Stadium on game day in Santa Clara, California. Taking place on January 21, 2026, as part of Super Bowl 60 festivities, this event is attracting fans preparing for a major weekend in sports. Attendees will experience top-notch offerings from Bullseye and enjoy a convenient, walkable option close to the stadium.

data.title: Engineers now control AI agents, not code. 2026 report: AI used in 60% work, only 0-20% tasks delegated. Rakuten, TELUS, Zapier share findings.
data.description: According to a report released in 2026 by Anthropic, developers are utilizing artificial intelligence in 60% of their work, but only allocating 0-20% of tasks fully to AI. The report highlighted insights from companies such as Rakuten, TELUS, and Zapier. For further details, please refer to the complete article.

data.title: Investigation launched into Roblox Corp by RGRD Law for potential securities violations. Investors/witness contact encouraged.
data.description: A law firm in San Diego, named Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP, is currently looking into potential breaches of U.S. federal securities laws related to Roblox Corporation (NYSE: RBLX). Investors of Roblox are urged to come forward with any information that might aid in the investigation. The investigation is centered on potential securities violations tied to Roblox Corporation.
Silver prices drop sharply, with spot silver down over 2% at $91.20 an ounce.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin bets big on decentralized social media with Farcaster/Lens trade. Users urged to stay put amidst changes.
data.description: There is a significant shift happening in the decentralized social media space as Ethereum founder Vitalik Buterin has urged users to remain engaged with the platform. The encouragement comes at a crucial time as the sector is experiencing a rapid transformation. The decentralized social media landscape is witnessing notable changes in user behavior and engagement. Vitalik Buterin's call to users is a response to this evolving landscape. It signifies the importance of user participation in the decentralized social media sphere. This development highlights the growing interest in decentralized platforms, with Buterin's message serving as a catalyst for increased user activity. It underscores the potential for further growth and evolution in the decentralized social media sector. As users navigate these changes, Vitalik Buterin's guidance reinforces the value of persistence and engagement in the decentralized social media space.

data.title: American Express Global Business Travel reduced interest rate and increased liquidity in NEW YORK.
data.description: American Express Global Business Travel announced a reduction in its interest rate alongside an increase in liquidity. The company took steps to lower the interest rate to promote cost savings. This move is expected to positively impact the company's financial standing. Additionally, an increase in liquidity was revealed, signaling improved access to funds for operational needs. This decision reflects the company's strategic approach to financial management.

data.title: Rocket Lab updates on Neutron rocket development on Jan. 21, 2026 in Calif. (Nasdaq: RKLB) - an update on their launch services and space systems.
data.description: In Long Beach, California, on January 21, 2026, Rocket Lab Corporation (Nasdaq: RKLB) disclosed information about advancements in its Neutron rocket development. Rocket Lab, renowned for its launch offerings and space technology, revealed this latest update.
